title: Forest
overview: Asia and Marek created their own paradise in the forest near the eastern border of Poland: a place where their children were going to grow up safely, far away from the problems of today’s world. One day, their lives are put to a severe test in the face of the growing humanitarian crisis on the border of the EU, happening right next to their home.
